mapper.sql: OBJECT_TYPE AS objectType, CODE AS code, NAME AS name, DOMAIN AS domain, STATUS AS status, DESCRIPTION AS description, CREATED_BY AS createdBy, CREATED_BY_ID AS createdById, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy, UPDATED_BY_ID AS updatedById, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_application_object_type
ORDER BY OBJECT_TYPE ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_application_object_type ( OBJECT_TYPE, CODE, NAME, DOMAIN, STATUS, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_BY, CREATED_BY_ID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{objectType}, #{code}, #{name}, #{domain}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdById}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), #{updatedBy}, #{updatedById}, COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_TYPE) DO UPDATE SET CODE = EXCLUDED.CODE, NAME = EXCLUDED.NAME, DOMAIN = EXCLUDED.DOMAIN, STATUS = EXCLUDED.STATUS, DESCRIPTION = EXCLUDED.DESCRIPTION, UPDATED_BY = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_AT

MERGE INTO tb_application_object_type ( OBJECT_TYPE, CODE, NAME, DOMAIN, STATUS, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_BY, CREATED_BY_ID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT ) KEY (OBJECT_TYPE) VALUES ( #{objectType}, #{code}, #{name}, #{domain}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdById}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{updatedBy}, #{updatedById}, COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_application_object_type
CODE = #{patch.code},
NAME = #{patch.name},
DOMAIN = #{patch.domain},
STATUS = #{patch.status},
DESCRIPTION = #{patch.description},
UPDATED_BY = #{patch.updatedBy}, UPDATED_BY_ID = #{patch.updatedById}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt}
WHERE OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType}
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_TYPE AS objectType, MAX_FILE_MB AS maxFileMb, ALLOWED_EXT AS allowedExt, ALLOWED_MIME AS allowedMime, POLICY_JSON AS policyJson, CREATED_BY AS createdBy, CREATED_BY_ID AS createdById, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy, UPDATED_BY_ID AS updatedById, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM tb_application_object_type_policy WHERE OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_application_object_type_policy ( OBJECT_TYPE, MAX_FILE_MB, ALLOWED_EXT, ALLOWED_MIME, POLICY_JSON, CREATED_BY, CREATED_BY_ID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{objectType}, #{maxFileMb}, #{allowedExt}, #{allowedMime}, #{policyJson}, #{createdBy}, #{createdById}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), #{updatedBy}, #{updatedById}, COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_TYPE) DO UPDATE SET MAX_FILE_MB = EXCLUDED.MAX_FILE_MB, ALLOWED_EXT = EXCLUDED.ALLOWED_EXT, ALLOWED_MIME = EXCLUDED.ALLOWED_MIME, POLICY_JSON = EXCLUDED.POLICY_JSON, UPDATED_BY = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT = EXCLUDED.UPDATED_AT

MERGE INTO tb_application_object_type_policy ( OBJECT_TYPE, MAX_FILE_MB, ALLOWED_EXT, ALLOWED_MIME, POLICY_JSON, CREATED_BY, CREATED_BY_ID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_BY_ID, UPDATED_AT ) KEY (OBJECT_TYPE) VALUES ( #{objectType}, #{maxFileMb}, #{allowedExt}, #{allowedMime}, #{policyJson}, #{createdBy}, #{createdById}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{updatedBy}, #{updatedById}, COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
